baseline: Atomic Red Team + osquery/Sigma-style endpoint telemetry
license: Atomic Red Team MIT; osquery Apache-2.0; Sigma Detection Rule License. This fixture is FrostMI-authored and contains no copied rule content.
focus: Endpoint runtime visibility for process identity, workspace file changes, outbound model endpoint evidence, and permission status.

knownGaps.reason: Development builds record permission state but do not require Endpoint Security entitlement-backed auth events.
The runtime bench records destination evidence without requiring Network Extension capture.
